_comment_1: Copy these two entries into external/LLaMA-Factory/data/dataset_info.json (merge with whatever is already there).
_comment_2: file_name is resolved relative to LLaMA-Factory's data/ directory. Either drop the exported files in there, or set file_name to an absolute path.
_comment_3: The mapping under columns + tags tells LLaMA-Factory how to read our ShareGPT-formatted output.
